acted_on_recommendations: [workflow] Add a repository quick-start checklist for validation commands.

agent_mood.label: focused
agent_mood.summary: The agent followed the documented workflow and verified each step before changing files.
agent_mood.evidence: The session used the repo checklist, ran the expected commands, and summarized remaining risks.

agent_question.question: What is the smallest safe change that satisfies the user request and keeps validation green?
agent_question.evidence: The agent inspected local instructions, read the relevant package scripts, and scoped the edit to the affected files.

config_diffs.summary: Documented the preferred branch and validation flow for future work.

friction_deltas.description: Validation commands were easy to discover.

friction_points.description: Previous sessions spent time rediscovering package-manager commands.
friction_points.evidence: The new guidance lists lint, check, test, and build commands.

recommendations.title: Keep validation commands in agent instructions
recommendations.body: Store durable validation guidance in Harness-managed instruction files so agents do not re-derive the workflow.

seven_day_pattern.summary: Alignment improved when repository instructions were explicit and validation was run before handoff.

your_mood.label: clear
your_mood.summary: The user gave direct implementation constraints and expected validation evidence.
your_mood.evidence: The request named the branch policy, the validation commands, and the expected scope.

your_question.question: Can the agent make the repo change without losing reviewability?
your_question.evidence: The desired outcome emphasized logical commits, clean staging, and a green validation suite.

agent_mood.label: iterating
agent_mood.summary: The agent found one failing check, fixed the formatting issue, and re-ran the command.
agent_mood.evidence: The second lint run passed after a focused formatter change.

agent_question.question: Which failed check is blocking a clean commit?
agent_question.evidence: The agent compared lint output with the touched file list before applying a fix.

friction_deltas.description: Formatter-only lint failures were resolved quickly.

friction_points.description: A formatter check failed on a generated mobile screen.
friction_points.evidence: Running the formatter updated the file without changing behavior.

recommendations.title: Run lint fix before staging
recommendations.body: Apply formatter changes before building commit groups so each commit stays reviewable.

seven_day_pattern.summary: Fast feedback loops reduced time spent on mechanical failures.

your_mood.label: focused
your_mood.summary: The user wanted the implementation landed without mixing unrelated refactors.
your_mood.evidence: The request called for logical commit groups and validation after each broad step.

your_question.question: Can the agent keep the branch ready for review?
your_question.evidence: The task emphasized clean staging boundaries and a green lint result.
